data.title: PropellerAds releases 2025 Ads Safety Report, highlighting moderation outcomes & fraud trends. #Cyprus #Advertising #PRNewswire
data.description: In Limassol, Cyprus on February 12, 2026, a leading global ad platform, PropellerAds, known for performance-driven advertising solutions, unveiled its latest Ads Safety Report for 2025. The report highlights moderation and security results on the platform, shedding light on fraud patterns and strategies.

data.title: Kodiak introduces new No Sugar Added Homestyle Power Waffles with 16g protein, 100% whole grains.
data.description: In a recent announcement from PARK CITY, Utah, on February 12, 2026, Kodiak introduced its newest product boasting no added sugar, crafted with 100% whole grains, and packed with 16g of protein. The renowned brand, celebrated for its protein-rich breakfast and snack offerings, has expanded its range with this latest launch.

data.title: Pediatric study shows increase in Mycoplasma pneumoniae cases among children post-COVID restrictions, emphasizing respiratory infection risks.
data.description: After the lifting of restrictions, researchers have observed significant interactions among pathogens, leading to a notable increase in Mycoplasma pneumoniae cases among children. This surge in infections has become a cause for concern. Acute respiratory infections continue to be a major reason for hospitalizations in children globally, highlighting the urgent need for effective preventive measures. The rise in Mycoplasma pneumoniae incidents underscores the importance of continued vigilance and enhanced public health strategies to safeguard the well-being of children.

data.title: Nebius Group N.V. (NASDAQ: NBIS) reports Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results. Earnings webcast scheduled at 8:00 a.m. ET. CEO letter available on investor relations website.
data.description: Amsterdam-based Nebius Group N.V. (NASDAQ: NBIS), a prominent AI cloud company, has revealed its unaudited financial performance for the fourth quarter and the entire fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025. In addition, the organization has released a quarterly letter to shareholders from its founder and CEO, Arkady Volozh, which can be accessed on its investor relations website at https://nebius.com/investor-hub. The management is scheduled to conduct an earnings webcast today at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time (5:00 a.m. Pacific Time / 2:00 p.m. Central Time).

data.title: MEDITECH to showcase intelligent Expanse EHR at HIMSS26, empowering providers and improving outcomes.
data.description: In Canton, Massachusetts, MEDITECH will be highlighting the benefits of its Expanse EHR system at the upcoming HIMSS26 event. This intelligent EHR platform is designed to empower healthcare providers and enhance patient outcomes. The company aims to demonstrate how Expanse EHR can improve efficiency and effectiveness in healthcare delivery.

data.title: Atlantic Energy Group appoints Kris Hertel as SVP of Sales on Feb. 9, 2026, to drive revenue growth and enhance relationships.
data.description: On February 12, 2026, Atlantic Energy Group LLC revealed the selection of Kris Hertel as their new Senior Vice President of Sales, starting from February 9, 2026. Hertel's responsibilities entail overseeing the company's sales approach, enhancing revenue generation, and fortifying partnerships within the organization.

data.title: Licel's DexProtector approved by EMVCo for the 6th year in a row, meeting stringent standards.
data.description: Licel's mobile application protection, DexProtector, has received further validation in the EMVCo SBMP SPT category. The company announced today in London on Feb. 12, 2026, that its solution passed independent evaluation, confirming its effectiveness.

data.title: JURA introduces the new C3 automatic coffee machine for purists, featuring advanced brewing technology.
data.description: Montvale, New Jersey - On February 12, 2026, it was announced that the JURA C3 fully automatic coffee machine has been launched for coffee enthusiasts seeking the pure flavor of espresso and black coffee. This machine, designed by JURA, is equipped with advanced brewing technology.

data.title: Content creator N3on partners with Doich Foods for cultural collaboration, focusing on authenticity.
data.description: In a new partnership announced on February 12, 2026, content creator N3on has teamed up with Doich Foods to create a culturally inspired collaboration focused on authenticity and connection. This collaboration aims to combine N3on's digital expertise with Doich Foods' culinary creations. The partnership seeks to leverage N3on's popular platform to reach a wider audience and promote the brand's products. This alliance brings together the creative influence of N3on with the culinary innovation of Doich Foods to offer a unique and engaging experience. The collaboration is set to launch across various platforms, with the aim of increasing brand visibility and connecting with consumers on a deeper level.

data.title: AudioEye's detection capabilities exceed industry standards by 89-253%, revealed in an independent study.
data.description: A recent study conducted by AudioEye, Inc. (Nasdaq: AEYE), a digital accessibility company based in TUCSON, Arizona, has uncovered significant disparities in the accuracy of automated Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) detection among various accessibility tools. The study, released on Feb. 12, 2026, reveals that there are wide variations in the effectiveness of these tools in identifying and addressing accessibility issues on websites. This research sheds light on the need for improved standardization and reliability in automated accessibility testing.

data.title: Ken Teng from YY Group wins HAPA Hospitality Service Entrepreneur Award in Malaysia. - SINGAPORE, 12 Feb 2026.
data.description: YY Group Holding Limited (NASDAQ: YYGH) has been recently recognized in the Malaysian market for their outstanding performance in hospitality service and leadership. The company, known for its on-demand workforce solutions and integrated facilities, has gained prominence for its excellence. This news, announced on February 12, 2026, in Singapore, highlights the company's significant achievements in the hospitality sector.

data.title: Paramount+ to premiere award-winning documentary "The Pink Pill" on March 6, sparking conversation on women's health with director Aisling Chin-Yee. Trailer and images released for the film.
data.description: The upcoming film "The Pink Pill: Sex, Drugs & Who Has Control," helmed by acclaimed filmmaker Aisling Chin-Yee from Montreal, is sparking a worldwide dialogue on women's health, empowerment, and healthcare parity in anticipation of International Women's Day. The trailer for this groundbreaking film can now be viewed through the provided link. This thought-provoking project aims to shed light on crucial issues and amplify women's voices on a global scale.

data.description: In Atlanta on February 12, 2026, Wheels Up Experience Inc. (NYSE: UP), a prominent on-demand private aviation provider, disclosed that their CEO, George Mattson, will speak at the Barclays Industrial Select Conference. This showcases the company's significant presence, with the opportunity for networking and industry insights.

data.title: Asurity Technologies and NotaryCam team up to offer full eClose solution for lenders, streamlining loan process.
data.description: On February 12, 2026, in Washington, lenders now have the ability to complete loan processes seamlessly by being able to create, sign, notarize, and securely store loan documents all in one continuous workflow. This is achieved by combining Asurity Technologies, LLC's top-quality document packages with the eClose proficiency of NotaryCam. This innovative partnership streamlines the loan procedure and ensures efficiency for all parties involved.

data.title: BlackSky Gen-3 secures seven-figure contract to enhance space capabilities for an international defense customer.
data.description: BlackSky's Gen-3 global expansion remains strong as they secure a significant contract worth over one million dollars from an overseas defense client.

data.title: OPSWAT names Jan Miller as CTO to drive perimeter threat detection strategy. Tampa, Feb. 12, 2026.
data.description: OPSWAT, a prominent cybersecurity solutions provider specializing in critical infrastructure protection (CIP), has unveiled its latest move to enhance its adaptive sandboxing and threat intelligence capabilities on a large scale. The company has appointed Jan Miller as the new Chief Technology Officer (CTO) to drive this strategic initiative. This development, announced on February 12, 2026, marks a significant step in OPSWAT's mission to strengthen its position in the market.

data.title: Intelligent Bio Solutions reports 48% revenue growth in Q2, surpassing $2M for H1 2026. Reader sales surge by 104% YoY.
data.description: Intelligent Bio Solutions Inc. reported strong financial results for the first half of fiscal 2026, with revenue surpassing $2 million, marking a 36% year-over-year increase. Reader sales more than doubled to 104% for the second quarter, showcasing a significant growth momentum. Gross profit margins also improved to 49%, up by 10% year-over-year, indicating increased operational efficiency. The company had a current assets balance of $12.17 million as of December 31, 2025, with $9.40 million receivable from a private placement of securities that closed on January 2, 2026. The company's CEO and CFO emphasized the successful execution of their strategic plans, driving the growth in reader and cartridge sales through deliberate marketing efforts and operational efficiency gains. The company also announced important highlights, such as additional clinical studies for FDA submission, a new manufacturing partnership to improve margins, and a strategic alliance with Vlepis Pty Ltd. These initiatives position the company for further growth and expansion into new markets. With a strong financial position and sustainable momentum, Intelligent Bio Solutions Inc. aims to continue its growth trajectory and regulatory pathway towards the U.S. market entry.

data.title: Live Ventures reported Q1 2026 financial results: Revenue $108.5M, Operating income $3.5M, Net loss $0.1M. Adjusted EBITDA up 35.7% to $7.8M.
data.description: Live Ventures Incorporated announced its financial results for the fiscal first quarter ended December 31, 2025. Key highlights include revenue of $108.5 million (compared to $111.5 million in the prior year), gross margin increase to 32.6%, operating income increase to $3.5 million, net loss of $0.1 million, and diluted loss per share of $0.02. Adjusted EBITDA increased to $7.8 million, total assets were $389.2 million, and stockholders' equity was $95.3 million as of December 31, 2025. The company successfully completed a $47.0 million refinancing for its Steel Manufacturing segment. Operating income increased by 352.9% despite challenges in the housing sector, and the company plans to integrate AI across its business units for operational improvement. Total cash and availability under credit facilities were approximately $38.7 million as of December 31, 2025. Revenue, gross profit, operating income, and adjusted EBITDA for various segments showed fluctuations compared to the previous year. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Benitec Biopharma reports Q2 2026 financial results; Cohort 1 in BB-301 treatment study shows durable response. Company has $189M in cash as of Dec 31, 2025. FDA meeting planned mid-2026. Responder Analysis assigns scores based on discrete response categories, with all Cohort 1 Completers responding to BB-301. Patient 1 in Cohort 1 continues to show disease-modifying effects at 24-month follow-up. Financials: $13.4M total expenses in Q2 2026, $11.8M net loss.
data.description: Benitec Biopharma Inc. has announced positive results from the BB-301 Phase 1b/2a treatment study for Oculopharyngeal Muscular Dystrophy-related Dysphagia. The first four patients in Cohort 1 completed a 12-month follow-up, with all four showing durable response to BB-301. Patient 1 in Cohort 1 continued to experience disease-modifying effects at the 24-month follow-up. An update on Cohort 2 is planned for mid-2026, and an FDA meeting for the pivotal study design is expected mid-year. Financially, the company reported total expenses of $13.4 million for the quarter ended December 31, 2025, with $189 million in cash and cash equivalents as of the same date. Research and development expenses were $5.8 million, while general and administrative expenses were $7.5 million. The loss from operations was $13.4 million, and the net loss attributable to shareholders was $11.8 million.
